invariants.name: Accepted Values Trace To Raw
invariants.statement: Every accepted value must trace to raw evidence.

invariants.name: Graph May Disagree
invariants.statement: The graph may contain contradictions, but SSOT may not.

invariants.name: No Silent Mutation
invariants.statement: Policy-relevant state must not mutate without an event and lineage.

invariants.name: Append-Only Evidence
invariants.statement: Accepted state transitions and audit evidence are append-only by default.

invariants.name: Deterministic Governed Paths
invariants.statement: Classify, resolve, promote, recover, and verify must be replayable from the same inputs.

invariants.name: Bounded Action
invariants.statement: Every action path must declare timeout, retry policy, budget, failure mode, and verify step.

invariants.name: Fail Safe Over Ambiguous Success
invariants.statement: If a dependency is missing or untrusted, the system narrows behavior or enters SAFE mode.
